title: DIG Network history.json
description: Rolling per-system health history produced by the status.dig.net probe cron and committed to public/history.json. Keyed by the same stable system id as status.json; each value is a bounded, time-ordered series of probe points (oldest first), capped at ~10 days of 5-minute samples. The coinset series additionally carries peakHeight on its points for cross-run freshness.

additionalProperties.description: Time-ordered series (oldest first) of probe points for one system id.

t.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of this point (the system's checkedAt).

latencyMs.description: Probe latency in milliseconds at this point (>= 0; 0 for derived rows).

peakHeight.description: (coinset series only) Chia mainnet peak block height recorded at this point, used to compute liveness on the next run.
